mapper.select:
SELECT e.id AS evaluationId, e.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS userNickname, e.mode, LEFT(COALESCE(e.task_prompt, ''), 120) AS taskPromptPreview, LEFT(e.essay_text, 140) AS essayPreview, e.overall_score AS overallScore, e.gaokao_score AS gaokaoScore, e.band, CASE WHEN ef.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS favorited, CASE WHEN d.status = 2 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS archived, e.created_at AS createdAt FROM essay_evaluation e JOIN users u ON u.id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.user_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN essay_favorite ef ON ef.evaluation_id = e.id AND ef.user_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN documents d ON d.id = e.document_id
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC, e.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM essay_evaluation e JOIN users u ON u.id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.user_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN essay_favorite ef ON ef.evaluation_id = e.id AND ef.user_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN documents d ON d.id = e.document_id
